name: Geneva's Party Punch
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Limeade concentrate or orange juice concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix pineapple juice, lemonade, and limeade (or orange) together.
2. Pour over ice just before serving.
3. Add water and sugar-free lemon-lime soda to the mixture.
Per serving: 55 calories (1 percent from protein, 99 percent from carbohydrate, 0 from fat), 0 protein, 14 grams of carbohydrate, 0 fat, 0 cholesterol, 1 gram sodium.
Exchanges: 1 fruit.
Makes 50 servings (5.5 quarts)
